## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./...`)
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] I've opened an issue and referenced it here (`refs #N`)
- [ ] This is a bug fix, not a new feature
